_meta.source: Liella! (Love Live! Superstar!!) characters, derived from raw data with fan vote data considered as evidence
_meta.note_on_fan_votes: Fan MBTI votes provided as input signal but not treated as authoritative. Used as weighted evidence alongside textual analysis. Majority vote followed when supported by independent analysis; flagged when close.
_meta.note_on_traits_format: Each trait includes both score (-10 to +10) and reason (textual justification from analysis).

kanon_shibuya.name: Kanon Shibuya

E.reason: Strong introvert — text explicitly flags her as 'the most timid and low-tension personality among all the protagonists,' a deliberate franchise shift from Honoka/Chika/Yu. Stage fright physically incapacitates her in early arcs, sings alone with headphones as her default mode, admits 'I'm not good at communicating in front of others,' flustered even in one-on-one interactions with strangers. Grows into leadership across 3 seasons but through earned confidence via specific relationships, not native energy-radiation. Home-mood (blunt, boyish, glasses, more-herself) versus school-mood (polite, flustered) shows she's most authentic in low-stakes settings. More introverted than Kosuzu (-2) because Kosuzu's loud affect is effortful-anxious-present while Kanon physically freezes under exposure.

J.reason: Slight P. No schemes or structured plans, growth is organic and responsive to situations, impulsive 12-hour boat ride to Chisato on tone-of-voice instinct, temporarily leaves Liella for Tomakanote as emotional-responsive decision. Has long-term commitments (singing dream, Vienna study plan, cafe help, student council VP in S2) which give her some J-structure, but orientation is adaptive-gentle rather than planned-and-executed.

T.reason: Strong F. Entirely feeling-and-values-driven cognition throughout. Text explicitly calls out her emotional expression as 'the most multifaceted among the protagonists,' with the most scenes of getting angry or crying. No analytical/logical cognition anywhere — her decisions come from felt-conviction (protectiveness of Chisato/Keke, idealistic faith in people's goodness, Fi-reframe of her 'ordinariness' as potential). Her creative output (singing, song writing) is Fi-authentic-expression-routed-through-music, not T-analytical craft.

C.reason: Very low baseline. Self-definition is 'ordinary high school student with nothing special about me,' 'absolutely nothing to brag about,' no talents, no future aspirations at series opening. Failed high school entrance exam creating trauma recurrence, depressed at Ep 1, Ep 3 breakdown ('useless, only making things worse for Keke'), foundational insecurity about having anything worth offering. Acts confidently in specific protective moments (stands up to bullies for Chisato, faces Ren down for Keke) — Fi-conviction pushing through the insecurity — but baseline self-view is deeply insecure. Grows significantly across 3 seasons but starts near Kosuzu-territory for foundational self-doubt.

M.reason: Moderate. Chose school-idol path specifically 'to break away from merely seeing myself as normal' (Fi-identity-growth ambition), pursued Vienna study abroad as sustained multi-year dream, temporarily left Liella for Tomakanote to challenge herself further, became club leader through earned authority. But ambition-scale is personal-growth-and-connection rather than competitive-dominance — she's not chasing #1 rankings or empire-building. Her want is 'cheer people through songs I love' and 'find something I can do.' Per the M-measures-want-not-work rule, her want is gentle-and-personal rather than loud-and-competitive.

O.reason: Mixed leaning positive. Genuine depression at series opening with trauma-recurrence pattern, real dips (Ep 3 breakdown, Aozora o Matteru containing 'I hate you' dark-side content), anxious baseline in early arcs. But consistent earned resilience — keeps trying despite stage fright, perseveres through 3 seasons into confident leader, Ep 11 phone call shows mature self-knowledge about asking for help from position of strength. Not cheerfully optimistic like Kaho (+7) or Ai (+8); more hard-won resilience through specific relational support. Net modest positive.

A.reason: High empathy. Selfless, loyal, 'aims to support and befriend everyone, even those who were initially unfriendly' (Wien example, Margarete arc), protective sense of justice activates around friends (fronts bullies for Chisato as children, stands up to Ren for Keke, defends Sumire in S2), reads specific people unusually well (Ep 6 Chisato phone-call pickup, Ep 11 sees through friends' lie). Idealistic-to-naive faith in people's goodness (trusts Natsumi despite warning signs). Core mission is cheering people through music. Not +8/+9 Emma-tier because her empathy is routed through her own individuation-arc (she helps from Fi-values, not Fe-broadcasting), and her care is bounded by her own processing capacity — she can't be the mom-of-everyone role.

U.reason: Low per external/internal alignment rule. Her central identity IS ordinariness — she repeatedly emphasizes 'I'm normal,' 'nothing special,' 'just an ordinary high school student.' Deliberately written as the relatable-everygirl protagonist — multiple reddit reads call her 'the most relatable Love Live character,' 'the closest Love Live gets to its idea of an ordinary girl who goes on to extraordinary things.' Charming specific details exist (Spanish grandma, paella, pet owl Manmaru, latte art, glasses-at-home, fixes sinks, androgynous blunt speech) but core archetype is conventional-shy-girl-finds-voice executed very well. Net negative.

N.reason: Moderate Ne. Sees potential in prickly people others dismiss (Wien, believing-best-of-Natsumi-against-evidence), musical meaning-making through metaphor (sunny-above-the-clouds outlook per PDB E), Vienna dream as abstract future-vision, idealistic-beyond-evidence Fi-Ne faith-in-goodness. Tempered by her groundedness in family/cafe/concrete daily service (helping mom with baked apples, latte art, practical competence fixing sinks) and her Si-loop during depression period per PDB B. Gentle open-minded Ne rather than wild scheme-generation.

kanon_shibuya.mbti_reasoning: INFP with overwhelming fan vote (121 vs 13 ENFP, ~9:1) and textual analysis supports it after stress-testing the stereotype-pull concern. Because shy-musical-protagonist pattern-matches to INFP aesthetically, this vote pattern demands extra scrutiny — but the Fi-Ne cognitive evidence holds up. The real contested diagnostic is Fi vs Fe, not Fi vs Ti — PDB opinion A's Fe-read (comparing her to Ayumu/Chika) is the serious challenge here. Decisive Fi-over-Fe evidence: (1) Her central identity struggle is abstract-values-level, not relational-role-level. 'I'm ordinary, nothing special' is Fi-identity-crisis territory — compare to Ayumu (ISFJ) whose insecurity is concrete-relational ('not good enough for Yu'). Kanon's is 'who am I as a person, what makes me worth something' — that's Fi working out personal meaning. Her self-introduction explicitly articulates the Fi-reframe: 'precisely because I am this ordinary, there might be something possible' — textbook Fi-through-internal-narrative self-articulation. (2) Home-mood vs school-mood gap is Fi authentic-private-self vs public-presentation distinction, not Fe context-adaptation. She's blunt/boyish/glasses-wearing at home because that's her real self; she's flustered/polite at school because that's Fi-dom effortfully managing exposure. Fe-doms don't experience this as a gap — public-presentation IS who they are. (3) Her solo song 'Aozora o Matteru' containing 'I hate you' per reddit F is pure Fi-routing-authentic-complex-emotion-through-creative-medium. That's Fi asserting personal values through art despite social risk. An Fe-dom protagonist song would land softer, harmony-preserving. (4) Stage fright is the telling diagnostic: she loves singing, sings alone constantly with headphones, but physically collapses when exposed to audiences. That's Fi-authentic-expression meeting inferior-Fe-exposure-terror — an Fe-dom would have opposite pattern (comfortable performing, uncomfortable solo-authentic-expression). (5) Idealistic-faith-in-goodness-beyond-evidence (Natsumi, Wien) is Fi-values-based faith, not Fe-harmony-reading — an Fe-dom would pick up the bad social signals correctly. Her reading of Chisato is specifically Fi-with-auxiliary-Ne applied to someone she deeply loves, not broad Fe room-reading — she reads CHISATO brilliantly, not groups generally. ENFP ruled out by explicit text framing of her as the most-introverted-protagonist, stage fright intensity, and the fact that her magnetism emerges through earned 3-year growth rather than as baseline energy. ISFP ruled out (PDB opinion B briefly considers it) by her head-bound abstract-ordinariness self-narrative — ISFPs with Se auxiliary are present-aesthetically-grounded; Kanon constantly thinks about her own identity, history, and hypothetical future self, which is Ne not Se. Her Vienna arc is particularly Ni/Ne-abstract future-vision not Se-present-action. Third INFP analyzed across the three casts, joining Rina (Nijigasaki) and Kosuzu (Hasunosora) — three very different Fi-Ne-Si-Te expressions: Kosuzu is outward-challenge-generation through inadequacy-narrative, Rina is inward-expression-problem-solving through creative-technical invention, Kanon is self-articulation-through-ordinariness-reframe routed through music. All three share the abstract-identity-level insecurity signature that distinguishes them from ISFJ-insecurity-patterns. Flagging real uncertainty: the Fi-vs-Fe diagnostic is tighter for Kanon than for Kosuzu or Rina because her people-reading skill and magnetic-with-prickly-people cluster is genuinely Fe-adjacent. Landing INFP at ~75/25 confidence rather than 95/5 — if someone argued ISFJ hard using the Fe-read, the strongest counter is the Fi-identity-level self-articulation pattern combined with the Aozora authentic-darkness content. She's the third and softest-profiled INFP in the set.

keke_tang.name: Keke Tang

E.reason: Strong extrovert. Moved countries alone (Shanghai → Japan) at young age for her dream, recruited Kanon door-to-door-style by chasing her all day Ep 1, founded the club, loud-energetic-broadcast baseline, Mandarin-when-excited language-leak (Fi-Ne passion flooding past Te-language-filter), mood-swings play out externally, bonds readily with new people (Mei, Margarete, eventually Sumire). Not Ai-tier (+9) because her energy is mission-channeled through specific idol-passion rather than pure-social-radiation, and she has real stamina limits (zero physical fitness, needs recovery).

J.reason: Strong P. Forgets to ask permission before mass-flyering (just-acts-on-impulse), zero advance planning on idol-training-despite-zero-stamina, emotional mood-swings drive decisions, stubborn idea-persistence rather than structured-execution, S3 arc explicitly about refusing to make future-decisions (Peter-Pan-stuck-in-Neverland per reddit E). Some long-term commitment-follow-through on the dream itself but execution is chaotic-impulsive throughout.

T.reason: Strong F. Entirely value-and-feeling-driven cognition. SunnyPa devotion as ideological-core (reddit D explicitly calls it 'religious'), Fi-grudge-pattern toward Sumire (her 'school idols are amateurish' comment wounded Keke's values deeply and persistently), tears-and-anger as baseline emotional mode, stated life philosophy is 'passion and a smiling face are the most important things.' No analytical cognition anywhere — her decisions are Fi-conviction-driven.

C.reason: Net positive with real cracks. External confidence is strong — moves countries alone, pitches school idols to strangers, faces down Ren's rejection repeatedly, stubborn self-assertion in arguments. But reddit A + D catch underlying pressure-feeling in S2 ('feels like she's under a lot of pressure to do well even if she doesn't really let it show'), Ep 3 confessional admits she had no real goal in life before idols (inferior-Te void beneath the passion-surface), S3 reveals sustained avoidance of growing-up-decisions. Net moderate positive through ideological-commitment-confidence riding over hidden direction-void.

M.reason: High. Moved countries for her dream, relentless recruitment (all-day chase of Kanon Ep 1), founded the club, pursues school-idol excellence with sustained multi-year devotion, eventually pivots to producer role as evolved-ambition in S3. Driven-stubborn-persistent through all three seasons. Not max because her ambition is passion-channeled (serve the idol-ideal) rather than competitive-dominance-structured, and the S3 reveal shows her ambition was partly a delay-tactic for facing growing-up-decisions.

O.reason: Strong resilience-and-optimism baseline. 'Fun-loving energetic optimist,' stated worldview is 'anything is possible if one never gives up,' ice-cream-washes-away-grouchy-feelings coping strategy inherited from mom, bounces back from Ep 3 'can't sing' moment, forgives Ren quickly after conversion, maintains bright affect across 3 seasons despite hidden pressures. Not max (Yu/Kaho +7-8 tier) because S3 reveals real underlying Peter-Pan-avoidance rather than pure-sunshine-resilience — she was optimistic partly because she was refusing to face harder decisions.

A.reason: High empathy. 'Caring friend who never gave up on Kanon' (reddit D), protective of Kanon through depression arc (Ep 3 singing-together breakthrough), eventually forgives and deeply cares for Sumire (S2 Ep 9 'I hate you' tears are Fi-conviction-wounded-by-Sumire's-sacrifice-on-her-behalf, 'she wants everyone to be happy in the end' per reddit B), nurturing with kouhai (RenRen, KinaKina nicknames show affection-through-naming), shares idol-fandom bond with Mei with mutual-crying. Tempered by stubborn-Sumire-grudge extending unreasonably long (reddit C's critique is valid) and self-focused passion-pursuit. Net high.

U.reason: Moderately distinctive. Chinese-Shanghai origin in Japanese idol setting, Mandarin-when-excited language-leak, 'Kuku' self-pronunciation quirk, chinese-cymbal-sound-effects accompanying dramatic-expressions, JLPT N1 certificate (academic prodigy background unmentioned until needed), ice-cream-as-emotional-regulation inherited-philosophy, 'desu-a-lot' speech pattern, religious-level-SunnyPa-devotion. Real particularity in surface presentation. Internal personality is more conventional-energetic-dreamer archetype executed well. Net moderate positive.

N.reason: Strong Ne. Vision-leap-from-one-data-point signature — heard Kanon sing ONCE and built entire future-plan around it (form group, recruit, school-idol dream together), long-arc abstract-ideal-pursuit of SunnyPa as worthy-of-devotion concept, pattern-extrapolation for predicting Ren's future-behavior from past-pattern (PDB opinion B's Ren-analysis example is actually Ne-abstract-pattern not Ni-single-insight), constantly generates possibility-framings around idols. Tempered by concrete Chinese-cultural-groundedness and specific catalog of mom's-sayings. Solidly N.

keke_tang.mbti_reasoning: ENFP with overwhelming fan vote (113 vs 9 ESFP, ~13:1) and textual analysis supports it after stress-testing the stereotype-pull concern. Lopsided-with-stereotype-pull votes demand extra scrutiny — 'manic-energetic-dreamer-girl' pattern-matches ENFP aesthetically, so the vote alone isn't decisive. The real contested diagnostic is Ne-Fi vs Se-Fi, and PDB opinion B mounts the serious ESFP case. It collapses on closer reading. Decisive Ne-over-Se evidence: (1) PDB opinion C correctly flags the mistranslation — her favorite saying 「思い立ったが吉日」 does NOT mean 'there's no time like the present' (Se-present-valuation) but rather 'you must act on what you think of right away' (Ne-idea-generation-into-immediate-execution). That reverses the strongest Se evidence the fan analysis cited. (2) The Kanon-recruitment pattern is categorically Ne not Se: heard Kanon sing ONCE and leapt to a full possibility-cascade (form group, recruit members, become school idols together across years). ESFPs read immediate performance-moments; Keke built years-of-future-plans from one data-point. (3) Her defining behavior is sustained long-arc vision-pursuit — moved countries for an abstract-inspiration, religious-level devotion to SunnyPa as ideological-concept (reddit D), multi-year idol-dream-commitment. ESFPs are present-responsive, not sustained-ideal-devoted. Keke's entire character runs on an abstract vision chased across years. (4) The Mandarin-when-excited language-leak is better explained as Ne-Fi flooding past Te-executive-function-filter than as Se just-getting-point-across — her internal passion overrides her language-code-switching. Se-doms have tighter present-moment output-control. (5) S3's 'Peter-Pan-stuck-in-Neverland' arc per reddit E is Ne-Fi stuck in possibility-preservation mode, not Se-present-enjoyment (which wouldn't feel stuck because Se lives natively in the present). (6) Her Sumire-grudge pattern is telling — reddit C flags the asymmetry (forgave Ren instantly, hated Sumire's amateurish-comment forever). The answer: Sumire attacked her Fi-core-value (sanctity of school-idol-devotion); Ren merely attacked Keke's plans (surmountable obstacle). Fi-doms hold grudges against value-violators specifically; that's a Fi-over-Te diagnostic that also confirms dominant-Fi rather than auxiliary. (7) PDB opinion B's Ren-analysis example — Keke predicting Ren's future-behavior from past-pattern-extrapolation — is actually Ne (abstract pattern inference) not Ni (single-insight-convergence). Opinion C's ENXJ alternative ruled out because Keke's execution is chaotic-stubborn-improvised (forgets permissions, mood-swings, impulse-driven), not Te-systematic. She has zero interest in strategizing idol-dom; she wants to BE an idol by loving idols. Te-Ni builds systematic plans first; Keke throws herself at dreams. Fourth ENFP across the three casts (Kasumi Nijigasaki, Kaho + Hime Hasunosora, now Keke) — four distinct flavors: Kasumi is schemey-selfish-surface ENFP with hidden warmth, Kaho is sunshine-metaphor-generator ENFP with hidden fragility, Hime is intense-fan-competitor ENFP with Fi-wound, Keke is devoted-religious-fan ENFP with Peter-Pan-stuckness. All four Fi-Ne-Te-Si stacks expressed radically differently through different life-contexts and trauma profiles.

chisato_arashi.name: Chisato Arashi

E.reason: Strong extrovert. 'Energetic and friendly extrovert,' bright sociable baseline, 'loves to converse with her friends and go shopping together,' self-describes as 'bright personality and very sociable,' catchphrase 'Wissu Wissu Wissu!' is outward-broadcast energy, gossip-network-attunement (keeps up on all school rumors), rap/dance/cheerful-head-in-the-clouds vibe per reddit D. Natural people-magnet quality. Not +8/+9 because her extroversion is warm-present-responsive rather than Ai-tier pure-radiation, and she has a private-serious core beneath the cheerful surface.

J.reason: Slight P. She becomes club president and manages practice regimens — structure when roles demand it. But her orientation is responsive-adaptive: lied to Kanon on-the-spot to force the solo-singing breakthrough (Ep 11 improvised intervention), 'goes with the flow' per PDB opinion A, quit takoyaki job and pivoted to full-time dance with minimal deliberation in S3. Moderate P through responsive-flexibility rather than planned-executor orientation.

T.reason: Strong F. Feeling-and-relational-driven throughout — entire character is organized around the Kanon-friendship-axis, emotional-attunement to others' states (reads Kanon's depression across a phone call, reads Mei's insecurity), Fi-value-individuation arc (wanting to stand on her own, do things Kanon couldn't do). Not max because her Se-aux gives her practical-decisive edges (willing to make harsh choices for the right reason) and reddit C's 'stone cold badass who goes against the grain' pattern shows real pragmatism. But core cognition is F.

C.reason: Net positive earned through arc. 'Archetypical Nietzschean superman' per reddit C's description at series-level, takes assertive initiative (lies to Kanon for her own good, forces Kanon's solo-breakthrough, argues against writers' OG-LL status-quo ending), becomes Liella leader when Kanon is gone, 'knew who she was and what she wanted' by S3. But childhood baseline was meek-soft-spoken-bullied, sx9 self-doubt pattern visible (PDB opinion C: felt she wasn't enough for Kanon, wanted to prove worthy of standing next to her), needs Kanon's empathy-feedback to build her own confidence per reddit C. Net moderate positive through earned-individuation-confidence.

M.reason: High-focused. Decided as a child she would not be defined as the bully-victim who needed Kanon's rescue, pursued dance-excellence specifically to prove she could do something Kanon couldn't, trained her physical-fitness through daily long-distance running, made the music-course, became Best-Dancer-in-Japan, became Club President. Multi-year sustained individuation-ambition. Not max because her ambition is Fi-individuation-scale (prove I can stand on my own) rather than competitive-dominance-or-empire-building scale.

O.reason: Solid resilience. 'Cheerful and energetic' baseline, bounces back from childhood-bullying trauma into self-actualization, maintains positive affect across 3 seasons, pragmatic-acceptance of S3 graduation realities and friend-separation. Some underlying self-doubt-sx9 pattern per PDB C but handled with stability. Not max because her cheerfulness has an earned-through-work quality rather than native-overflowing like Kaho/Ai/Yu.

A.reason: High empathy expressed through high-agency care. Entire character is organized around Kanon-devotion (long boat-ride just to support Chisato's mirror-case — wait, Kanon did that for her; Chisato reciprocates constantly), mentors Shiki in S3 building her confidence the same way Kanon built Chisato's, cares deeply enough about Kanon's development to do the hard thing (Ep 11 force-solo-singing 'lie'), willing to make painful S2 choices for Kanon's best interests, 'returns the favor' as reddit C puts it. Tempered by 'scary when angry' private-edge and the fact that she's more Kanon-focused than broadly-Fe-broadcasting. Net high.

U.reason: Notably distinctive. 'Wissu Wissu Wissu' masculine-informal-greeting catchphrase (unusual for a female idol character), circle/round-object obsession (draws perfect circles, obsessed with Oriental Pearl Tower, wary-Manmaru interactions, circles her catchphrase on takoyaki), white-hair-with-buns distinctive-design, rap skills, breakdancer-professional-training, takoyaki part-time-worker, 80s-90s clothing-vibe per reddit D, 'half-crazy' eccentric-energy beneath the cheerful surface. Both external surface particulars and internal eccentricity-layer. Solid positive.

N.reason: Moderately S. Se-auxiliary expressed through physical-body-focus (breakdance-training, long-distance running, 'wants to move her body and be active' per PDB B), concrete-craft-mastery orientation (dance-technique-discipline, cooking skill, precise-circle-drawing as physical-skill), grounded-in-present-moment tactical responsiveness (real-time lie-to-Kanon intervention, in-the-moment reading of friends' states). Gossip-attunement is Se-social-present-tracking not Ni-pattern-divination. Some tertiary Ni visible (sustained multi-year individuation-vision) but dominant mode is present-physical-concrete.

chisato_arashi.mbti_reasoning: ESFP — DISSENTING FROM MAJORITY FAN VOTE. Fans voted ESFJ 70 vs ESFP 20 (~78/22, moderate majority). Going ESFP after stress-testing because the Fi-individuation-arc and Se-physicality-core are decisive against Fe-Si pattern. ESFJ case is legitimate and worth steelmanning: PDB opinion D's soc-2 read catches real evidence (supports Kanon before herself, becomes club president, tracks gossip, connects people, 'defines herself by usefulness to the group'), reddit D's 'Liella would fall apart without her' captures Fe-social-structuring function, her consistent supportive-role across the cast has Fe-broadcast quality. But the cognitive engine driving all of this is Fi not Fe, and the aux is Se not Si. Decisive Fi-over-Fe evidence: (1) Her defining arc is pure Fi-individuation — PDB opinion C nails it: 'wanted to do something Kanon couldn't,' 'wanted to feel confident on her own,' 'wanted to prove she was worthy of standing next to Kanon.' She didn't choose dance to harmonize with a group or serve the system; she chose it specifically to establish herself as a distinct individual with her own capability-domain. That's textbook Fi-individuation-arc, not Fe-role-fulfillment. An ESFJ would find a role that fits the system and excel in it; Chisato CREATED her distinctness through dance specifically BECAUSE it separated her from Kanon. (2) Her willingness to do harsh-unpopular-right-thing is Fi-conviction, not Fe-harmony. Reddit C catches this precisely: she 'lies to Kanon to force her to sing on her own' even though it looks cruel on the surface. Fe-doms avoid harsh interventions because they disrupt harmony; Fi-doms will do the painful thing if their internal values say it's correct. Reddit C: 'that assertiveness is Chisato's defining trait that I don't think has any parallel in any other Love Live girl. That conviction in one's choices even if it seems unpopular.' That's pure Fi. (3) Her S2 argument 'against the writers themselves, repudiating OG Love Live's status quo ending' by pushing Kanon to Vienna is Fi-values-based-intervention — she knew the right-for-Kanon path wasn't the stay-with-the-group path. An ESFJ would preserve the group; Chisato broke it open for Kanon's Fi-individuation-need. (4) Her core trauma-response was Fi-identity-protection: 'did not want to be defined as solely a bully victim that needed Kanon to rescue her.' That's Fi refusing an externally-imposed identity and insisting on self-definition — not Fe seeking a better social role. Decisive Se-over-Si evidence: (1) PDB opinion B catches this: 'wants to move her body and be active,' stereotypical Se-dom physical-focus. Breakdancer-professional-training, daily long-distance running, circle-drawing-as-physical-skill, takoyaki part-time. Her competence-domain is entirely physical-present. (2) Her intervention-style is in-the-moment tactical (Ep 11 improvised lie, immediate phone-call reading of Kanon's tone). ESFJs plan harmonization strategies; Chisato reads and responds in real-time. Her gossip-attunement per wikipedia is Se-social-present-tracking (what's happening now in the social field), not Si-historical-continuity-tracking. (3) 'Quit takoyaki job and said she was pursuing dance full time' (reddit C) with minimal deliberation in S3 while Kanon/Keke agonized over decisions across episodes — that's Se-Fi direct-present-commitment, not Si-Fe tradition-preserving-deliberation. ISFP ruled out by her clear extroversion (leadership role, gossip-central, energetic-social-baseline, initiates with strangers). ESFJ ruled out by the cumulative Fi-individuation-harsh-right-thing-conviction pattern. Chisato joins Ai (Nijigasaki) as the second ESFP in the cast — different flavor: Ai is pure-sunshine-Se-Fi with no constructed-persona-layer; Chisato is disciplined-individuation-ESFP with Fi-values-conviction visible beneath the cheerful surface. The Fi-individuation-arc signature also connects her to the ISFP Fi-individuation characters (Karin, Rurino) — different type (extroverted), same core Fi-process of 'establishing authentic self against external definitions.' She's the ESFP-pastor variant: uses Se-presence-and-skill to intervene correctly on Fi-values-intuition, not to absorb group-harmony. Flagging that this is a real dissent against a moderate-majority vote — confidence ~70/30 ESFP over ESFJ. If someone argued ESFJ hard, the strongest counter is the cumulative pattern of Fi-individuation-arc, harsh-right-thing-willingness, and pure Se-physical-aux.

sumire_heanna.name: Sumire Heanna

E.reason: Net positive but not strongly extroverted. Performs outwardly (Galaxy catchphrase, video uploads, L-tuber content, kidnapping-Kanon-on-impulse, centers-of-songs, active-showbiz-pursuit since childhood), active-showy-presence in group settings, 'heroine appears last' self-announcement style. But wikipedia explicit: 'acts somewhat arrogant and rude to strangers, making her anti-social to her classmates.' Warms specifically to bonded people (Keke, Natsumi, little sister). Extrovert through constructed-output-performance rather than native-social-energy-draw. Less extroverted than Kasumi (+5) who approaches strangers actively despite sharing the performance-persona pattern.

J.reason: P-leaning. 'Very flaky and whimsical, not very organized' per PDB opinion A, schemes and persona-constructions repeatedly fall apart (audition rejections, isopod-infamy, S2 self-sabotage scheme), kidnapping-Kanon-on-impulse when shame-triggered, mood-driven decisions, career-reinvention pivots across seasons (showbiz-child → school idol → L-tuber → agency). Some showbiz-discipline-residue from childhood training (can mimic choreography on a whim, rap-skill) but core orientation is improvisational-reactive.

T.reason: F but weaker than other Fi-doms because the T-presentation is so consistent it deserves weight. Her core cognition on emotional topics runs Fi-internal-values-and-wounds: self-worth crisis arc ('feels like she's the worst'), specific-caring-for-Keke (S2 self-sacrifice is Fi-conviction-for-specific-individual at cost to self), shrine-philosophy-articulation ('don't ask the gods to do everything for you, do your best together and make your own wishes come true' is pure Fi-values-statement). Some tertiary-Te visible in showbiz-tactical-thinking (understands casting-game, navigates agency-world). Net moderately F — her core motivations and wounds are feeling-driven despite the cocky veneer.

C.reason: Neutral per 'seems X but actually Y' rule. External presentation maximally confident — prima-donna style, 'of course you all know my name,' Galaxy-famous declarations, arrogant-to-strangers. But text explicitly states: 'this was most likely a mask... she feels like she's the worst, so she always acts like she's the best.' Always-second-place rejection-pattern, refused center-spot for Nonfiction because of internalized-failure, 'unable to allow herself to deserve something' per reddit E, PDB opinion B's song-lyric analysis shows underlying anxiety ('I'm still a bit anxious,' 'hard to be proud of yourself'). Surface and baseline cancel out. She does have real talent-competence which prevents a deeply negative score.

M.reason: Very high. Dream is 'charismatic Galaxy School Idol across the entire universe' — unusually large-scale ambition-framing. Pursued showbiz since childhood ('intensely devoted her formative years to the craft of pleasing an audience'), continued through high school, won centering roles, centered Nonfiction (defining S1 song per reddit B), ends up signed at agency by S3. Ambition is relentless even when Fi-wound-driven compensation. Not max (Lanzhu/Megumi +8-9 tier) because her ambition is validation-seeking rather than empire-building or excellence-pursuit — she wants to be SEEN as special more than to achieve specific structural outcomes.
